page.content: In the BHP Group's capital project milestones overview comparing the years 2020, 2021, and 2022, the following financial metrics are detailed. For the year 2020, the NewMiningProject generated Revenue(€M) of 1500, with a NetIncome(€M) of 300, CAPEX(€M) amounting to 200, and OPEX(€M) of 225. The ExpansionInitiative followed with Revenue(€M) of 1200, a NetIncome(€M) of 250, CAPEX(€M) of 175, and OPEX(€M) of 200. The SustainabilityProject's Revenue(€M) was 1000, yielding a NetIncome(€M) of 200, with CAPEX(€M) at 150 and OPEX(€M) at 175. ExplorationVentures contributed Revenue(€M) of 800, with a NetIncome(€M) of 100, a CAPEX(€M) of 80, and OPEX(€M) of 60. Lastly, CommunityDevelopment reported Revenue(€M) of 600, with a NetIncome(€M) of 50, CAPEX(€M) of 60, and OPEX(€M) at 80.

page.content: Transitioning to 2021, the NewMiningProject increased its Revenue(€M) to 1800, with NetIncome(€M) of 350, CAPEX(€M) of 225, and OPEX(€M) of 200. The ExpansionInitiative also saw growth with Revenue(€M) of 1400, NetIncome(€M) of 300, CAPEX(€M) of 200, and OPEX(€M) of 175. The SustainabilityProject achieved a Revenue(€M) of 1100, with a NetIncome(€M) of 175, CAPEX(€M) of 150, and OPEX(€M) of 150, providing a comprehensive overview of financial performance across these initiatives.
